type_meaning: (n) sự xao lãng, sự mất tập trung, sự đãng trí, sự giải trí, thú tiêu khiển
example: To provide a ______ from the noise, Luisa's dentist offered her a pair of earphones

type_meaning: (n) sự động viên, sự khuyến khích
example: Let me offer you some _____ about your crooked teeth.
The presence of a wisdom tooth was not _____ until the dentist started to examine the patient.
The patient had a _____ of grinding his teeth during his sleep.

type_meaning: (v) giải thích, giảng giải, làm sáng tỏ
example: Let me turn on more lights to properly ______ the back teeth.
The broken tooth rubbed againsts my tongue, _____ing it.
I did a quick _____ of your teeth and they look in good shape.

type_meaning: (n) vị trí, tư thế, địa vị
example: Let me tilt your head to a more comfortable _____ for you.

type_meaning: (adv) thường xuyên, đều đặn, theo quy tắc
example: She brushes _____ after every meal.
The cleaning _____ed the whiteness of my teeth.
My insurance does not _____ me to choose my own hospital.

type_meaning: (n) sự lựa chọn (một trong hai); phương án thay thế
example: I'd like to know the _____ to this treatment before I agree to it.
The _____ of HMOs that people most dislike is the lack of personal service.

type_meaning: (v) liên quan, dính líu, quan tâm; (n) việc phải lo
example: Whenever I have health _____s, I call my doctor.
The nurse _____ed the importance of eating a balanced diet.

type_meaning: (v) hình thành, ra đời, thừa hưởng
example: Dominic _____s the cost of a co-payment at each doctor's visit
The office manager insteaded that she need more _____ to finish the project on time.
Company _____ did not provide for overtime pay.
A _____ of my benefits is my health care coverage.
_____ of the cost, we all need health insurance.
The receptionist believed that he worked too hard for such a small _____.
I have finally found a health plan that is _____ for my needs.
The staff refused to _____ the patient until he had proof of insurance.

type_meaning: (n) sự cho phép, sự cấp phép, sự phê chuẩn
example: The nurse could not submit an _____ over the phone, it had to be done in writing.

type_meaning: (v) chỉ định, chọn lựa, bổ nhiệm
example: On her admittance form, Grandmother _____ed Aunt Tessa as her chief decision-maker.

type_meaning: (n) người dẫn đường, người đi theo, người hộ tống
example: You cannot leave the unit on your own, you'll have to wait for an _____.

type_meaning: (v) xác định, định danh, nhận dạng, đồng nhất hoá, coi như nhau
example: Your medical records are all marked with your patient number to _____ them in case of a mix-up.
The hospital chaplain took as his _____ to visit every patients admitted each day.
Would you check with the nurse to see if I am _____ed to eat before surgery.
The patient's health record contained _____ information, like the dates of all his inoculations.

type_meaning: (n) thủ tục, chuỗi hành động (cần được hoàn thành để thực hiện cái gì).
example: Can the hospital to schedule this _____ for tomorrow.
Your lab _____s won't be ready for hours

type_meaning: (n) bản kê khai, bản báo cáo tài chính
example: The billing _____ was filed with the insurance company last month.
It is not _____ for that kind of surgery to be performed on an outpatient basic.
May I _____ with you about a drug interaction case I have?

type_meaning: (v) chỉ huy, điều khiển, kiểm soát
example: To _____ the cost of this medication, you may get the generic verson.
Is this a _____ location for you to pick up your prescription?
My doctor put me through some simple tests to _____ if I have asthma.

type_meaning: (n) nhân tố, yếu tố tạo thành
example: Could my cat be a _____ contributing to my asthma.

type_meaning: (n) sự ảnh hưởng lẫn nhau, tác động qua lại
example: The _____ between the patient and the doctor showed a high level of trust.
My presciption has a _____ of three refills.

type_meaning: (v) theo dõi, giám sát (= keep track of)
example: The patient had weekly appointments so that the doctor could _____ her progress.
Given the _____ delay in getting reimbursed by the health plan, why don't we just fill one prescription today?
The pharmacist gave Myra a few free _____s of the allergy medication.

type_meaning: (n) cảm giác, khả năng phán đoán
example: I got the _____ it would be better to get my prescription filled right away.

type_meaning: (n) tình nguyện viên ; (v) xung phong làm
example: My doctor _____ed to call the drugstore, so my medication would be waiting for me.
